name: Golden Star Resource Corp.
business: Golden Star Resource Corp. is an exploration stage mining company incorporated in Nevada, engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mining claims. It has not generated any revenues from operations and relies on the sale of securities and loans from officers and directors to fund operations. The company holds the GSR group of unpatented lode mining claims in Churchill County, Nevada, but has incurred no expenditures on the properties due to lack of cash.

exposures.sentence: We are an exploration stage mining company, incorporated in Nevada. The Company has been in the exploration stage since its formation and is primarily engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mining claims.
